name: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I Right
summary: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I Right is a right issued by Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I, allowing holders to purchase shares of common stock in connection with a business combination. Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is based in the United States.
